article.title: 2026-03-13 每日科技简报
article.subtitle: 来自 3 个来源的科技与商业洞察（过去 24 小时）
article.content:
📰 Morning Brew

☕️ A very ‘Dora’ update

Paraskevidekatriaphobia is the fear of Friday the 13th. It’s a tough year for those afflicted, since there are three Friday the 13ths in 2026. That’s the most there can be in a single year.

  • Paraskevidekatriaphobia is the fear of Friday the 13th. It’s a tough year for those afflicted, since there are three Friday the 13ths in 2026. That’s
  • So, if you have any 13th-aphobes in your life, be extra nice to them today. And definitely do not let them go near any ladders, mirrors, or mysterious
  • —Matty Merritt, Sam Klebanov, Molly Liebergall, Adam Epstein, Holly Van Leuven

📰 TLDR

AI-native management 🤖, revenue addiction 💰, fintech moats 🛡️

Strong identity verification protects your business; adjusting friction based on risk keeps your conversions flowing. To do both, you need a modern identity platform.

  • Strong identity verification protects your business; adjusting friction based on risk keeps your conversions flowing. To do both, you need a modern id
  • Persona's Startup Program gives early-stage companies access to the same tool used at Etsy, LinkedIn, and Twilio – starting at $0:
  • → 500 free verifications/month for 12 months

Meta's AI flop 🤖, Google Maps redesign 🗺️, Perplexity Agent API 🧑‍💻 

No scraping infrastructure.No proxy rotation.No parser maintenance.

  • No scraping infrastructure.No proxy rotation.No parser maintenance.
  • Use cases include:👉 AI grounding👉 Market research👉 SEO, GEO, & rank tracking
  • Special offer for TLDR: Start with 250 free searches/month or claim 3 months at 50% off for new accounts.

When product discovery breaks down 🧩, rethinking product 🧱, kill your darlings 🔥

Replit's new Agent 4 attacks that problem directly, and shortens the idea→shipped loop to days. It's a multi-agent system for building products - not stitching together prototypes.

  • Replit's new Agent 4 attacks that problem directly, and shortens the idea→shipped loop to days. It's a multi-agent system for building products - not
  • → Use parallel Agents to plan, design, and build multiple features in the same environment, at the same time
  • → Build apps on top of AI services, your data stack, or integrations like Notion, Linear, Figma
